sentiment: The space between what we know and what we say is where the interesting work happens.

stories.title: Why senior developers fail to communicate their expertise
stories.summary: Expertise that can't be explained isn't expertise — it's just noise that dressed well.

stories.title: Rendering the Sky, Sunsets, and Planets
stories.summary: Art和技术 meet in the physics of light — the same equations that render a sunset also explain why we see color at all.

stories.title: Show HN: Needle — We Distilled Gemini Tool Calling into a 26M Model
stories.summary: Small models doing one thing well is more interesting than large models doing everything adequately.
